/usr/bin/clang++ -fPIC -g -shared -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/firfilter.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libfirfilter.so -o libfirfilter.so CMakeFiles/firfilter.dir/firfilter_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/firfilter.dir/firfilter.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,"/home/bfr/devel/github_procmt_2021/procmt_2021/out/build/Clang 19.1.7 x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/base/prc_com:" ../base/prc_com/libprc_com.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
